data.content: 1. src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts, src/lib/backends/beads-backend.ts, and src/lib/bd.ts do not add queued ancestors for active children in in_action view, so the delivered behavior does not match the knot description. 2. Current targeted tests pass only because they still encode the pre-fix behavior; they do not validate ancestor reinclusion for active beats. 3. Sanity gates checked during review: bunx tsc --noEmit passed, bun run test passed, bun run build passed, bun run lint returned warnings only.
